summary: RCare iteration 3 verified. Backend pytest: 26/26 PASSED (5 regression test_api + 14 test_rcare_new + 7 new test_rcare_iter3). New iter3 coverage: admin password default '2255', insulin/food/water core CRUD regression, and strict DD/MM/AAAA date format in insights of /api/assistant and /api/reports?period=week (regex \b\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}\b) with negative assertion that ISO \d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} must NOT appear. Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): Home renders exactly 5 uniform cards with expected testIDs and titles (INSULINA, ALIMENTAÇÃO, ÁGUA, ASSISTENTE, ADMINISTRADOR). Home does NOT contain 'Gerar relatório PDF' button and has NO FAB Assistente. Tapping ADMINISTRADOR routes to /admin-login; password 2255 navigates to /admin panel showing 3 cards (Estatísticas, Relatórios PDF, Configurações). Wrong password (0000) stays on admin-login (no navigation). Splash shows 'RCare' only (no tagline) per code review. Admin password restored to '2255' after change-password test.
critical_code_review_comments: server._fmt_br correctly formats YYYY-MM-DD to DD/MM/YYYY and is used in every insight string (water, glucose, meals) in _build_insights.

Admin password flow unchanged: default 2255 in settings collection; PDF access gated by admin-login UI (no backend PDF endpoint exposed; PDF generation is client-side in /reports screen behind admin panel).
Home uses a single uniform CARDS array of 5 entries — no separate 'Gerar relatório PDF' button nor FAB Assistente remain in app/index.tsx.
admin.tsx has exactly 3 cards (stats/reports/settings) with testIDs admin-stats-btn, admin-reports-btn, admin-settings-btn.
Splash markup shows only R + Care (no tagline text).
seed_data_creation: TestAssistantDateFormat and TestReportsDateFormat each seed one insulin record (glucose=250, notes=TEST_iter3) for yesterday's date and delete it in finally. TestCoreEndpointsRegression seeds+deletes one record per resource. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: export EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=$(grep EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2); pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Admin pwd default 2255. Home has 5 cards; admin panel has 3 cards. Insights strings must only contain DD/MM/YYYY date format.
